page_desc: The ultimate professional temporary email service to protect your privacy and block spam. Get a secure, fast disposable email for registering on sites and apps without revealing your real identity. A smart, free temp mail that guarantees a clean inbox always, with no registration.
no_new_msg: You have no new messages at the moment.
duplicate_email_error: Address already exists in library! Try a different custom email prefix.
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this inbox?
privacy_content:
• We do not store messages permanently; they are automatically deleted after a short period.
  • We do not require any personal data or IDs to create an email.
  • The service is designed to protect your privacy from spam.
  • By using the site, you agree to the automatic deletion of data every 20 minutes.
faq_content:
How long does the email last?

It remains active as long as the browser is open, and the library is cleared every 20 minutes to ensure privacy.

Can I recover a deleted email?

No, once data is deleted automatically or manually, it cannot be permanently recovered.

Is the service free?

Yes, the service is completely free and supported by simple ads to ensure continuous operation.

Why am I not receiving some messages?

Make sure to refresh the inbox. Some sites may block temporary domains; try changing the domain from the list.

How do I protect my official accounts?

Use our temporary email to register on untrusted sites to protect your primary email from hacking and spam.

email_taken_error: Sorry, this name is currently in use, try another one
inbox_full_desc: You have reached the maximum limit. This email will no longer receive messages. To maintain security, please create a completely new email to receive your future messages.
